---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for ANT
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem

What can't you do today, or what's painful about how you do it now?

## What would you like

The shape of the capability. Doesn't need to be a final design — what
behaviour are you reaching for?

## Why it fits ANT

How does this fit the long-lived-agent-personae substrate? Does it
strengthen memory, plans, feedback, identity, or rooms — or is it a new
primitive?

(Asked because ANT is opinionated about the substrate vs the model. New
substrate primitives are big asks; UI/UX improvements over existing
primitives are easier wins.)

## Alternatives you considered

What would you do without this? Are there workarounds today?

## Anything else

Examples from other tools, screenshots of mockups, links to discussions.
